Recent publications
Integrating ecological feedbacks across scales and levels of organization. (2024) B. Pichon, S. Kéfi, N. Loeuille, I. Lajaaiti, I. Gounand. Ecography
The interplay of facilitation and competition drives the emergence of multistability in dryland plant communities. (2024) B. Pichon, I. Gounand, S. Donnet, S. Kéfi Ecology
Telling mutualistic and antagonistic ecological networks apart by learning their multiscale structure. (2024) B. Pichon, R. Le GOff, H. Morlon, B. Perez-Lamarque Methods in Ecology and Evolution
Quality matters: Stoichiometry of resources modulates spatial feedbacks in aquatic‐terrestrial meta‐ecosystems (2023) B.Pichon, E. Thébault, G. Lacrox, I. Gounand. Ecology Letters
